reference: NOW WHEN THE FIREMAN HEARD THESE WORDS HE FEARED FOR ZAU AL MAKAN AND WEPT WITH EXCEEDING WEEPING AND SAID TO THE EUNUCH BY ALLAH IT WAS NOT I AND I KNOW HIM NOT
text: now when the fireman heard these words he feared for zaw al makan and wept with exceeding weeping and said to the eunuch by allah it was not i and i know him not
